keyEvents.event: Proclamation of independence from the Netherlands
keyEvents.impact: Four-year revolutionary war forged national identity around anti-colonialism and unity in diversity
Hosted the founding moment of the Non-Aligned Movement; neutrality became doctrinal
Army-led purges killed hundreds of thousands and installed Suharto's New Order for three decades
Economic collapse toppled Suharto and seared a lasting caution about external economic dependence
Successful democratization of the world's largest Muslim-majority nation; military pulled back from politics

keyEvents.event: Loss of East Timor and Bali bombings
keyEvents.impact: Separatism and jihadist terror pushed counterterrorism and territorial integrity to the fore

keyEvents.event: Rise of Jokowi and infrastructure decade
keyEvents.impact: Development-first pragmatism, nickel-driven industrial policy, and hedging between the US and China

history.narrative: A sprawling archipelago of 17,000 islands practicing a 'free and active' foreign policy: friends with all, allied with none, and instinctively suspicious of great-power blocs. Its energies go to economic development, ASEAN centrality, and holding a vast multiethnic nation together rather than projecting power abroad.

redLines.description: Foreign support for separatism in Papua or any challenge to archipelagic territorial integrity
Incursions into the Natuna Islands exclusive economic zone
Blockage of vital sea lanes through the Malacca and Sunda straits

internalDivisions.name: Papuan separatism and periphery resentment of Java
Islamist conservatism vs. pluralist Pancasila state
Tensions around the Chinese-Indonesian commercial minority

goals.description: Industrialize through downstream processing of nickel and critical minerals
Lead ASEAN and keep Southeast Asia out of great-power blocs
Defend the Natuna EEZ and maritime sovereignty across the archipelago
Contain Papuan separatism and jihadist terrorism at home
